revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{COinS safe|n}} This template provides a way to wrap [[:en:Wiki markup|Wiki markup]], or plain text, in (single) [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]]. More importantly, it helps to keep the markup free of line noise and thus [[Wiki#Pages and editing|easier to edit]]. === Usage === * {{tlc|bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} → {{bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} * {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} → {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} * {{tlc|bracket|plain text}} → {{bracket|plain text}} * {{tlc|bracket}} → {{bracket}} * {{bracket| spaced }} → {{bracket| spaced }} === Function === This template is a simple wrapper around the [ and ] [[:en:HTML entities|HTML entities]] that produce starting and ending brackets, respectively. The template cannot output just an ending bracket. You will have to use ] to produce the "]" ending bracket. This template is not necessary in [[WP:CS1|Citation Style 1]] templates. You can simply use square brackets, and they will be treated as ordinary text (and not wiki markup) when it constructs links. === See also === * [[Template:Sic]] * [[Template:Typo]] * [[Template:Brackets]] – to wrap content in double [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]] * [[Template:Brace]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }} { "params": {}, "format": "block" } [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{COinS safe|n}} This template provides a way to wrap [[:en:Wiki markup|Wiki markup]], or plain text, in (single) [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]]. More importantly, it helps to keep the markup free of line noise and thus [[Wiki#Pages and editing|easier to edit]]. === Usage === * {{tlc|bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} → {{bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} * {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} → {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} * {{tlc|bracket|plain text}} → {{bracket|plain text}} * {{tlc|bracket}} → {{bracket}} * {{bracket| spaced }} → {{bracket| spaced }} === Function === This template is a simple wrapper around the [ and ] [[:en:HTML entities|HTML entities]] that produce starting and ending brackets, respectively. The template cannot output just an ending bracket. You will have to use ] to produce the "]" ending bracket. This template is not necessary in [[WP:CS1|Citation Style 1]] templates. You can simply use square brackets, and they will be treated as ordinary text (and not wiki markup) when it constructs links. === See also === * [[Template:Sic]] * [[Template:Typo]] * [[Template:Brackets]] – to wrap content in double [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]] * [[Template:Brace]] {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }} { "params": {}, "format": "block" } [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23127601988|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{COinS safe|n}} This template provides a way to wrap [[:en:Wiki markup|Wiki markup]], or plain text, in (single) [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]]. More importantly, it helps to keep the markup free of line noise and thus [[Wiki#Pages and editing|easier to edit]]. === Usage === * {{tlc|bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} → {{bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} * {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} → {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} * {{tlc|bracket|plain text}} → {{bracket|plain text}} * {{tlc|bracket}} → {{bracket}} * {{bracket| spaced }} → {{bracket| spaced }} === Function === This template is a simple wrapper around the [ and ] [[:en:HTML entities|HTML entities]] that produce starting and ending brackets, respectively. The template cannot output just an ending bracket. You will have to use ] to produce the "]" ending bracket. This template is not necessary in [[WP:CS1|Citation Style 1]] templates. You can simply use square brackets, and they will be treated as ordinary text (and not wiki markup) when it constructs links. === See also === * [[Template:Sic]] * [[Template:Typo]] * [[Template:Brackets]] – to wrap content in double [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]] * [[Template:Brace]] {{Sandbox other|| }} { "params": {}, "format": "block" } [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{COinS safe|n}} This template provides a way to wrap [[:en:Wiki markup|Wiki markup]], or plain text, in (single) [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]]. More importantly, it helps to keep the markup free of line noise and thus [[Wiki#Pages and editing|easier to edit]]. === Usage === * {{tlc|bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} → {{bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} * {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} → {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} * {{tlc|bracket|plain text}} → {{bracket|plain text}} * {{tlc|bracket}} → {{bracket}} * {{bracket| spaced }} → {{bracket| spaced }} === Function === This template is a simple wrapper around the [ and ] [[:en:HTML entities|HTML entities]] that produce starting and ending brackets, respectively. The template cannot output just an ending bracket. You will have to use ] to produce the "]" ending bracket. This template is not necessary in [[WP:CS1|Citation Style 1]] templates. You can simply use square brackets, and they will be treated as ordinary text (and not wiki markup) when it constructs links. === See also === * [[Template:Sic]] * [[Template:Typo]] * [[Template:Brackets]] – to wrap content in double [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]] * [[Template:Brace]] {{Sandbox other|| }} { "params": {}, "format": "block" } [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Bracket%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{COinS safe|n}} This template provides a way to wrap [[:en:Wiki markup|Wiki markup]], or plain text, in (single) [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]]. More importantly, it helps to keep the markup free of line noise and thus [[Wiki#Pages and editing|easier to edit]]. === Usage === * {{tlc|bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} → {{bracket|[[Wikipedia:Example]]}} * {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} → {{bracket|[[Hernals |17th district of Vienna {{bracket|Austria}}]]}} * {{tlc|bracket|plain text}} → {{bracket|plain text}} * {{tlc|bracket}} → {{bracket}} * {{bracket| spaced }} → {{bracket| spaced }} === Function === This template is a simple wrapper around the [ and ] [[:en:HTML entities|HTML entities]] that produce starting and ending brackets, respectively. The template cannot output just an ending bracket. You will have to use ] to produce the "]" ending bracket. This template is not necessary in [[WP:CS1|Citation Style 1]] templates. You can simply use square brackets, and they will be treated as ordinary text (and not wiki markup) when it constructs links. === See also === * [[Template:Sic]] * [[Template:Typo]] * [[Template:Brackets]] – to wrap content in double [[:en:Square brackets|Square brackets]] * [[Template:Brace]] {{Sandbox other|| }} { "params": {}, "format": "block" } [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
